CustomField.description: Determines how the supplement is applied to the calculated price. Percentage: the supplement value is applied as a proportional surcharge (price × (1 + value / 100)). Percentage supplements are applied first and cascade multiplicatively. Fixed: the supplement value is added as a flat amount in the specified currency (price + value). Fixed supplements are applied after all percentage supplements.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select Percentage for proportional surcharges or Fixed for flat-amount surcharges.
CustomField.label: Calculation Method
